title: Assemble and fit braking system components
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Assemble and fit braking system components demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to assemble and fit braking system components

pcs.text: Identify job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Obtain and interpret procedures and information for assembling and fitting braking system components to identify options required for the job1.3 Identify hazards and environmental issues, assess potential risks and implement control measures in line with workplace policies1.4 Identify tools and equipment required for the job and examine for serviceability
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Obtain and interpret procedures and information for assembling and fitting braking system components to identify options required for the job1.3 Identify hazards and environmental issues, assess potential risks and implement control measures in line with workplace policies1.4 Identify tools and equipment required for the job and examine for serviceability?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Obtain and interpret procedures and information for assembling and fitting braking system components to identify options required for the job1.3 Identify hazards and environmental issues, assess potential risks and implement control measures in line with workplace policies1.4 Identify tools and equipment required for the job and examine for serviceability.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to assemble and fit braking system components

elements.title: Assemble and fit components

pcs.text: Inspect components for suitability and report faults according to workplace procedures 2.2 Assemble components according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, workplace health and safety and environmental requirements2.3 Fit components according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, and workplace health and safety requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Inspect components for suitability and report faults according to workplace procedures 2.2 Assemble components according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, workplace health and safety and environmental requirements2.3 Fit components according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, and workplace health and safety requirements?

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Assemble and fit components

elements.title: Test components

pcs.text: Obtain and interpret testing procedures from manufacturer specifications3.2 Test braking system according to manufacturer specifications and adjust as required3.3 Tag failed components for further work3.4 Record test results according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Obtain and interpret testing procedures from manufacturer specifications3.2 Test braking system according to manufacturer specifications and adjust as required3.3 Tag failed components for further work3.4 Record test results according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Obtain and interpret testing procedures from manufacturer specifications3.2 Test braking system according to manufacturer specifications and adjust as required3.3 Tag failed components for further work3.4 Record test results according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Carry out final inspection to ensure work is to workplace expectations and vehicle is ready for use according to workplace procedures4.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures 4.3 Examine and store tools and equipment according to workplace procedures4.4 Complete workplace documentation according to workplace procedures
